title: Sentimental Value's Golden Globe Recognition
text: Sentimental Value achieved a historic achievement by receiving 8 Golden Globe nominations, notably breaking out of the foreign-language category. The film earned recognition for: Best Film (Drama), Best Director (Joachim Trier), Best Screenplay (Trier and Eskil Vogt), and four acting nominations. Cast Nominations: The ensemble cast received notable recognition with all four leads receiving nominations: Stellan Skarsgård - nominated, Renate Reinsve - nominated, Elle Fanning - nominated for her supporting role as Rachel Kemp, an American movie star character, Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas - nominated for her role as Agnes. Director Trier emphasized his pride in the cast recognition: I think that's maybe what makes me the most proud and attributed this to his focus on casting and supporting actors' performances. Elle Fanning acknowledged the surreal experience of playing a Hollywood star while being one herself, noting that the cast group text was popping off with celebratory messages following the announcement.
